title: SPA Yield Lab — BTC Cycle Signal Record
description: A BTC capital-cycle signal (docs/15 / docs/36, BTC-003). DECISION-SUPPORT ONLY: the BTC cycle module never auto-trades (ADR-YL-007). Any action it suggests is a human-facing recommendation that must still pass the deterministic RiskPolicy and named human approval before any exposure changes; it never mutates runtime allocation or the execution path. No LLM sits in the risk/execution path. Metrics must be real and sourced; unknown inputs are treated cautiously, never as a bullish default.

confidence.description: Confidence in the detected phase, in [0,1]. Low confidence widens caution; never used to justify auto-action.

metrics.description: The real, sourced on-chain / market metrics that produced the phase call (e.g. MVRV, realized-price, funding, dominance). Values require verification; keys/shape are module-defined.

source.description: Data source(s) the metrics were pulled from; must be reproducible by our own code.

as_of.description: Timestamp the signal is valid as of (ISO-8601 UTC).

recommended_action.description: Human-facing recommended action for the detected phase. DECISION-SUPPORT ONLY (ADR-YL-007) — advisory input to a human, never auto-executed; still subject to RiskPolicy + human approval.

human_approval_required.description: Always true. The recommendation cannot change exposure without named human approval; the module never auto-trades (ADR-YL-007).
